queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name LIKE '3Dconnexion 3DxWare 10%' AND publisher = '3Dconnexion';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name LIKE '3Dconnexion 3DxWare 10%' AND publisher = '3Dconnexion' AND version_compare(version, '10.9.13.740') < 0);
